name: Suka Duka Berduka
overview: After the sudden death of the respected Opa Rauf, his family gathers for a series of traditional mourning rituals, only to find themselves caught in a whirlwind of shocking revelations, conflicts, and unexpected humor.

trailers.title: Trailer Resmi | Suka Duka Berduka | Jihane Almira Chedid, Luna Maya, Tora Sudiro, Oka Antara
